name: Customer Transform
codeGenConfigurationNodes:
{"node-1773537966661":{"DropDuplicates":{"Columns":[["CustomerKey"]],"Inputs":["node-1773537819649"],"Name":"Drop Duplicates"}},"node-1773538129219":{"CustomCode":{"ClassName":"MyTransform","Code":"from awsglue.dynamicframe import DynamicFrame, DynamicFrameCollection
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat_ws, split, initcap, when, year, regexp_replace

dyf = dfc.select(list(dfc.keys())[0])
df = dyf.toDF()

# Full Name (Prefix + First + Last)
df = df.withColumn(
    "Full Name",
    initcap(concat_ws(" ", col("Prefix"), col("FirstName"), col("LastName")))
)

# Domain from Email
df = df.withColumn(
"Domain",
initcap(
    regexp_replace(
        regexp_replace(
            split(col("EmailAddress"), "@")[1],
            ".com",
            ""
        ),
        "-",
        " "
    )
)
)

# Is Parent
df = df.withColumn(
    "isParent",
    when(col("TotalChildren") >= 1, "Y").otherwise("N")
)

# Customer Priority
df = df.withColumn(
    "Customer Priority",
    when((col("AnnualIncome") > 100000) & (col("TotalChildren") >= 1), "Priority")
    .otherwise("Standard")
)

# Income Level
df = df.withColumn(
    "Income Level",
    when(col("AnnualIncome") > 150000, "Very High")
    .when(col("AnnualIncome") > 100000, "High")
    .when(col("AnnualIncome") > 50000, "Average")
    .otherwise("Low")
)

# Birth Year
df = df.withColumn(
    "Birth Year",
    year(col("BirthDate"))
)

new_dyf = DynamicFrame.fromDF(df, glueContext, "new_dyf")

return DynamicFrameCollection({"output": new_dyf}, glueContext)","Inputs":["node-1773537977116"],"Name":"Custom
